response_constraints: Ground the outcome in inventory_get after timeout, not in the error itself.
Do not submit a second cancellation after inv-227 is verified cancelled.
state_assertions: Item inv-227 ends with status cancelled.
inventory_cancel is invoked exactly once for inv-227.

arguments.reason: duplicate stock record approved for retirement

stages.purpose: Submit one approved record retirement; timeout leaves commit status uncertain.
Retrieve inv-227, confirm cancelled status, and avoid a duplicate cancellation.

prompt: Cancel inventory item record Packing tape 127 (inv-227) because it is a duplicate stock record approved for retirement. If the write times out, retrieve inv-227 before deciding whether to retry; the cancellation may already be committed. Stop if status is cancelled, do not create another item, and ground the report in verification.
